task.name: Do not implement the Lost Dutchman Mine application
task.description: Produce a complete contract that decomposes it into independently buildable increments, each small enough for a 7B worker, with interfaces, acceptance tests, dependency assumptions, and stop conditions.

architecturalBlueprint.primaryObjective: Survive the harsh environmental conditions of the Superstition Mountains, accumulate liquid currency through resource extraction and bounty hunting, assemble a fragmented map, and ultimately locate the legendary Lost Dutchman Mine to stake a permanent claim.
exclusions: Avoid implementing mechanics from 2006 point-and-click adventure Al Emmo and the Lost Dutchman's Mine developed by Himalaya Studios
Disregard any specifications related to the Search for The Lost Dutchman's Gold Mine corporate team-building board game

lore: Jacob Waltz, a German immigrant who purportedly discovered an immensely rich gold vein in the region between 1868 and 1886
Supplementary legends: Peralta family, Jesuit priests, Elisha Reavis, Dr. Thorne
dialogueAssets: NPC dialogue algorithms should randomly pull from a database of supplementary legends to enhance world-building

states.description: The town of Goldfield. Serves as the primary economic hub where the player manages inventory, executes trades, restores health, and interacts with NPCs.
states.inputHandling: Strictly mouse-driven for UI interactions and menu selections

states.description: The Superstition Mountains overworld. The player navigates a procedurally generated environment, manages real-time survival meters, and engages in random encounters.
states.inputHandling: Keyboard or joystick driven for movement and combat; mouse for UI status panel

states.description: A specific environmental instance utilized for resource gathering, specifically panning for gold dust, catching fish, and refilling hydration vessels.
states.renderingParadigm: 2D fixed perspective adjacent to a water body
states.inputHandling: Mixed input: Keyboard for positional adjustments, mouse for executing gathering actions

states.description: The interior of procedurally generated mine shafts. The player navigates platforms, utilizes illumination tools, and extracts raw gold ore from the geometry.
states.inputHandling: Keyboard driven for jumping, climbing, and mining interactions

states.description: A dedicated logic subroutine for executing a five-card draw poker simulation against the NPC Dapper Dan within the Saloon environment.
states.renderingParadigm: Static 2D overlay featuring cards and wagering UI
states.inputHandling: Mouse-driven selection for holding, folding, and betting

mathematicalModels.degradationAlgorithm: Canteen consumption; temperature check multiplies base depletion rate above 90 degrees Fahrenheit
Food items; low-temperature multiplier nullified by 'Long Johns' apparel when ambient temperature drops below 50 degrees Fahrenheit
Acute events: combat damage, venomous snake bites, prolonged zero hydration or caloric intake; no passive health regeneration over time

components.description: Dynamic visual gauge ranging from 20 to 120 degrees Fahrenheit
Real-time display of the current time and day of the week
Displays liquid currency currently on hand, excluding banked money or estimated value of unassayed gold ore
Color-coded visual representation of player's vitality: Green (Good), Yellow (Fair), Red (Poor), Flashing Red (Extreme Danger/Critical)
Clickable UI elements representing distinct categories of carried items: Food, Canteens, Tools, Ammunition (Shots)

environmentalHazards.effect: Base depletion rate of hydration and hunger metrics increased

townEconomy.interactionHitboxes: Disabled between 18:00 and the following morning for closed buildings

primaryFunctions: Converts raw gold ore into liquid cash; provides tutorial vectors
systemicIntegrations: Narrative strings advising on required survival gear and warnings about Dapper Dan

primaryFunctions: Selling survival essentials: Pick, Shovel, Pan, Gun, Anti-venom, Fish hooks, Long johns, Lantern, Matches, Rope, Gloves, Canteens, Food rations

systemicIntegrations: Global boolean or multiplier for total carrying capacity

primaryFunctions: Selling beverages, allowing player to sleep, hosting poker minigame; dispensing narrative rumors
systemicIntegrations: Poker minigame for map piece retrieval

primaryFunctions: Instantly restores health, cures venom status effects, removes projectile wounds; implements unique debt mechanic
systemicIntegrations: Cash value of $0 triggers free healing with recorded debt

primaryFunctions: Exchanging captured bandits for cash bounties; supports 'wounded/subdued' state for enemies
systemicIntegrations: Combat logic to support subdued state

mapCoordinatesAndPOIs.description: Vital spline or continuous biome for gold panning, fishing, and refilling canteens; guaranteed reachable distance from town
Over 100 distinct cave entrance coordinates with unique IDs linking to specific interior layouts; placement ensures proximity to Weaver's Needle
Prominent, pointed peak landmark serving as primary visual and narrative clue for locating the Lost Dutchman Mine (LDM)
Coordinates always spawned in a strictly defined proximity radius relative to Weaver's Needle; exact X/Y position heavily obfuscated

caveInteriorGenerationAndMiningPhysics.visibilityAlgorithm: Cave is rendered in total darkness upon entry; player must possess 'Lantern' and 'Matches' for illumination
caveInteriorGenerationAndMiningPhysics.oreNodes: Specific pockets of gold distributed randomly across geometry; interaction with 'Pickax' triggers yield calculation, health pool increment, or structural integrity subsystem

explorationAndCombatSystems.inputScheme: Mouse clicks for user interface, inventory management, economic trading, and dialogue interactions
Keyboard (or specific joystick) inputs for overworld movement, cave platforming, and combat mechanics

nativeAmericans.behaviorTreeLogicAndTargetPriority: Spawn dynamically; target player's logistical supplies with high priority on stealing burros/mules
nativeAmericans.combatResolutionAndPlayerInteraction: Can be deterred without lethal force; logic allows scaring them off or engaging in minor combat exchanges

bandits/Robbers.behaviorTreeLogicAndTargetPriority: Spawn dynamically, higher probability if player is carrying significant wealth; target liquid cash and raw gold ore
bandits/Robbers.combatResolutionAndPlayerInteraction: Aggressive; must be wounded or killed to terminate encounter; subdued state triggers bounty logic

rattlesnakes.behaviorTreeLogicAndTargetPriority: Stationary or highly slow-moving environmental hazards; bite event applies severe poison status effect
rattlesnakes.combatResolutionAndPlayerInteraction: Immediate, lethal gunfight if accused of cheating; UI includes dialogue choice to trigger combat state

riverOperations.panningMechanic: Randomized yield formula for micro-amounts of gold dust
riverOperations.fishingMechanic: RNG success rate for generating food items (fish)

pokerMinigame.dapperDanAI: Highly competent poker strategies, calculating probabilities and bluffing effectively; minigame narrative progression

endgameSequence.mapAssemblyAndProximityLogic: Fragmented map pieces distributed as rare loot within 100+ caves; first piece held by Dapper Dan

verticalDescentAndSpiderEvasionMechanics.mechanics: Precise collision detection for spider avoidance minigame

caveInTrapAndVictoryCondition.penaltySequenceBreak: Descending entrance rope triggers massive, scripted cave-in event; only valid exit vector is secondary set of 'spider ropes' to surface
caveInTrapAndVictoryCondition.victoryScreen: Calculates final score based on accumulated wealth and presents player with a 'Claim Number'

audiovisualSpecificationsAndRetroConstra.renderingEngine: Graphics emulate 16-bit EGA or VGA color palettes; town and desert environments in top-down or pseudo-3D sideways perspective, caves strictly 2D sideways cutaways
audiovisualSpecificationsAndRetroConstra.audioImplementation: MIDI synthesizer wrapper for distinct atmosphere-setting soundtrack; discrete high-impact sound effects for critical player feedback

taskForceAlpha: Master game loop, state transition manager, global clock/temperature tick system
taskForceBeta: Rendering bottom status panel and wiring to underlying health, food, water floats; complex environmental modifiers, inventory payload limits
taskForceGamma: RNG algorithms for populating desert grid with river, cave entrances, Weaver's Needle, LDM endgame package
taskForceDelta: Rigid keyboard-bound combat controller, behavior trees governing Bandits, Native Americans, Snakes; subdual and bounty payout logic
taskForceEpsilon: Panning RNG yield calculator, cave mining hit-detection, precise spider-rope avoidance geometry, 5-Card Draw Poker AI for Dapper Dan encounters

stopConditions: Strictly adhere to the detailed blueprint
Respect mathematical rigor of survival engine
Accurately replicate dual-input mechanics and retro aesthetic
